# YUUSHI Admin Portal — Complete Frontend Documentation
*Generated by exhaustive code analysis of every HTML source file (excluding `_agent-portal/` and `_support-portal/`). Static HTML admin portal mockup for the "AnnaJapan" / "YUUSHI Administration Portal" real-estate platform. No build system, bundler, backend, or test runner — standalone `.html` files with inline `<style>`/`<script>`; all data hardcoded; destructive/external actions stubbed with `confirm()`/`alert()`/toasts.*

## 2. Design System

The portal has **three coexisting style lineages**. Most pages share a warm beige/brown palette; messaging "Center" modules add a navy CTA; `agent-ad-booking.html` is a dark theme.

### 2.1 Color Palette (canonical beige design-token set)

Used as `:root` custom properties on the newer pages (`property/*`, `usermanagement/user|agent|admin`, `contentmanagement/blog|cms|static`, `monetisation ads/ad-management`, etc.):

| Variable | Hex | Used For |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg-body` | `#f5f3ef` / `#f5f0e8` / `#f8f4ed` | Page background |
| `--bg-card` | `#fffaf2` / `#ffffff` | Cards/panels |
| `--border-subtle` | `#eadccd` / `#e5d9c0` | Card/input/table borders |
| `--border-strong` | `#d9c8b4` | Stronger borders, inputs |
| `--accent` | `#c26b41` / `#c4714a` | Primary accent (buttons, icons, focus) |
| `--accent-dark` | `#a55232` / `#a5572d` | Primary hover/gradient end |
| `--accent-deep` | `#8a4324` | Deepest accent (tags) |
| `--gold` | `#c4a25f` | Gold accent, focus outline, `::selection`, scrollbar hover |
| `--text-main` | `#3b2f2a` / `#2a1f18` / `#2c1810` | Primary text |
| `--text-muted` | `#7a6a5c` | Secondary text/labels |
| `--text-dim` | `#9b8568` | Dim text |
| `--badge-green` | `#2f855a` | Active/published/success |
| `--badge-red` | `#c53030` / `#c41e3a` | Danger/error |
| `--badge-gray` | `#4a5568` | Neutral/deactivated |
| `--badge-amber` | `#b7791f` | Warning/pending |
| `--badge-blue` | `#2c5282` | Info |
| `--badge-purple` | `#6b46c1` | CRM/members |

**Status badge fills (recurring across the suite):** green `#e6f6ef`/`#b7e4cc`; amber `#fff6e0`/`#fbd38d`; gray `#f7f7f8`/`#d2d6dc`; red `#fde8e8`/`#fbcaca`; blue `#e0f2fe`/`#bae6fd` or `#e4eefb`; purple `#f3e8ff`/`#ddd6fe`; gold/paid `#fef3c7`/`#fcd34d`/`#92400e`; silver `#e2e8f0`/`#cbd5e0`; bronze `#fed7aa`/`#fdba74`/`#9a3412`.

**Overview dashboards** (`overview/*`, all byte-identical CSS) add: `--surface #fff`, `--brown #3b2a1a`, `--brown-mid #6b4c35`, `--green #2d6a4f`, `--red #c41e3a`, `--blue #1d4e89`, `--orange #c05621` + `-lt` variants; `--shadow 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.09)`, `--shadow-md 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.11)`, `--r 10px`, `--r-sm 6px`. Chart palette `C = {gold #c4a25f, blue #1d4e89, green #2d6a4f, red #c41e3a, muted #6b5c4e, orange #c05621}`.

**Messaging "Center" modules** (`message-center`, `email-center`): `--navy #1e3a5f`, `--navy-dark #16293f`, `--accent #c4714a`, `--thead #f0ede8`, `--radius 14px`. Sent chat bubble `#8b7355`.

**Dark theme** (`agent-ad-booking.html`): `--bg #0a0a0a`, `--bg-elev-1 #141414`, `--gold #c8a96e`, `--text #f3ede0`, `--success #4ade80`, `--danger #f87171`, `--warning #fbbf24`.

**Auth page** (`Authentication.html`): brand gold `#d4a017`, body `#f5e8d3`.

### 2.2 Typography
- **Primary font:** `system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif` (most pages).
- **Variants:** `"Segoe UI", Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif` (index.html, overview/*, Authentication); `Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif` (admin-messages, agent-monetisation); `"Inter", system-ui…` (agent-ad-booking declared-but-not-loaded; client-monetisation loads Inter via Google Fonts); `"Plus Jakarta Sans"` (admin-messages legacy head).
- **Monospace:** `ui-monospace, "Consolas", monospace` for id pills/slugs.
- **Heading sizes:** h1/page-title 22px (some pages override to 24px/800 via polish); card-title 14–17px; KPI value 24–34px; table 12–13.5px; labels 11px uppercase.

### 2.3 Spacing & Layout
- Container/body padding commonly `24px 32px` or `clamp(16px,2.5vw,24px)`.
- Card radius `12–14px`; inputs/buttons `8px`; pills/badges/toggles `999px`; modals `14–16px`; avatars `50%` or `18px`.
- Card shadow `0 8px 24px rgba(115,72,39,0.05)` (beige pages) / `0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.02)` (UX-kit pages) / `0 10px 30px rgba(115,72,39,0.04)` (system pages).
- Master/detail or list/detail is the dominant page architecture (two-column or two-stacked-view with show/hide).

### 2.4 Responsive Breakpoints
- `max-width:1199px` — tables become `display:block; overflow-x:auto` (shared `#uxTableOverflowFix` block).
- `max-width:960px` / `900px` — two-column layouts collapse to one (`#uxResponsiveSplitFix` forces 1-col with `!important`).
- `max-width:768px`/`760px`/`720px` — headers/toolbars/field-grids/hero stack vertically.
- `max-width:700px` — index.html hides top-bar title/search hint/account meta.
- Newer pages use `clamp()` fluid typography and `auto-fit minmax()` grids.

### 2.5 Shared "UX Kit" (injected style + script blocks)
Several pages append common blocks: `#uxBaselinePolish` (font smoothing, pointer cursors, focus-visible `#c4a25f` outline, webkit scrollbar `#f5ece0`/`#d9c8b4`, `::selection` gold, anchor `#8a5a3b`), `#uxTableOverflowFix`, `#uxVisualPolish`, `#uxDetailLayout`, and a **UX KIT** `<script>` exposing:
- `window.Toast` — `.ok/.err/.info/.show` transient toasts (auto-dismiss ~3.8 s, slide-in `@keyframes ux-slide`).
- `window.UX` — `.confirm(opts)` modal (`#uxConfirmModal`), `.guard(action)` dirty-discard confirm, `.markClean/.markDirty` (`window.UX_dirty` + body `.ux-dirty` pill), `.validate(form)` inline required/email validation, Esc-to-close, backdrop-click close, `beforeunload` guard.

Pages using the UX kit: `usermanagement/agreement-templates`, `lead-management`, `login-recovery-management`, `roles-permissions`, `support-account-management`, `property/property-approval-moderation`, `property/property-detail-view`.

## 4. Per-File Documentation

### 4.1 index.html (App Shell)

#### Overview
The admin shell and the only page hosting navigation. Renders a fixed 280px sidebar (logo + multi-section menu + bottom user card), a top-bar with a global quick-search (8 entity categories with tabbed results), a chat/inbox shortcut with an unread badge, and a global account avatar dropdown. The main content area is an `<iframe id="contentFrame">` defaulting to `overview/kpi-dashboard.html`. Clicking a `.menu-item[data-content]` swaps the iframe `src` and toggles `.active`. **No router, no hash/history; the URL bar never changes.**

#### CSS Summary
- Font Awesome 6.5.0 (CDN). Font `"Segoe UI", Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif`. No CSS custom properties (literal hex).
- Sidebar/user-card bg `#f8f4ed`, border `#e5d9c0`; logo-icon/active text `#1a1a1a`; admin-badge/sidebar badge `#c41e3a`; section-title `#8b6f47`; menu-item text `#4a3f35`, hover `#f0e6d2`, active bg `#ede4d0` + left-border `#c4a25f`; content-area bg `#f3eee5`; top-bar bg `#fffaf2`; accent `#c26b41`. Search status pills use the full status-badge palette.
- Sizes: sidebar 280px, top-bar 56px, search-input 38px/max 640px, search-panel max-height 520px, chat-btn 40px, acct-avatar 36px, acct-dropdown min-width 280px.
- Shadows `0 16px 40px rgba(60,41,28,0.18)` (panels); transitions 0.1–0.2s; `@media (max-width:700px)` hides title/hint/acct-meta.

#### Functions Reference
| Function | Parameters | Description | Called By |
|---|---|---|---|
| (DOMContentLoaded) | — | Wires menu clicks, calls initTopSearch/initAcctMenu | load |
| `toggleAcctMenu` | e | Toggle `.open`, sync aria | acctTrigger |
| `closeAcctMenu` | — | Close dropdown | profile/logout/outside/Esc |
| `acctOpenMyProfile` | — | Load admin-management, set active | My Profile |
| `acctLogout` | — | confirm → redirect Authentication.html | Log out |
| `setUnreadCount` | n | Set/clear chat badge (>99 → "99+") | (defined, never called) |
| `openInbox` | — | Load admin-messages, set active | chatBtn |
| `initAcctMenu` | — | Outside-click + Esc listeners | load |
| `rank` | text,kw | Match score (exact0/starts1/incl2/-1) | searchAll |
| `searchAll` | kw | Search all categories by `fields` | input |
| `hl` | text,kw | Highlight match | ROW_RENDER |
| `escapeHtml` | s | Escape `&<>"` | hl, render |
| `fmtYen` | n | `¥`+locale | ROW_RENDER |
| `statusPill`/`planPill` | s/p | status/plan pill span | ROW_RENDER |
| `navigateResult` | cat,item | iframe src `target?id=…`, set active | result row |
| `renderTabs`/`renderResults` | — | Build tabs/results | input, tab click |
| `openPanel`/`closePanel` | — | Toggle `.open` on searchPanel | input/focus/Esc |
| `initTopSearch` | — | Wire input/clear/focus/keydown | load |

#### Data Structures
`SEARCH_DATA` — 8 arrays: `customer`(5: id,name,email,phone,status,target), `agent`(5: id,company,repName,license,email,plan,status,target), `support`(3), `listing`(5: id,name,address,price,status,agent,target), `inquiry`(4), `report`(3), `payment`(4: id,invoice,user,amount,status,date,target), `content`(4: id,title,tags[],publishDate,target). `CAT_META`(label,icon,fields[] per category), `CAT_ORDER`(8 keys), `unreadMessages`=12.

#### Modals
Two dropdown overlays (`.acct-dropdown`, `.search-panel`) — no backdrop modals. Logout uses native `confirm()`.

#### Notes
Iframe routing only; search navigates with `?id=`. Commented sidebar items whose files exist on disk (customer-support-console, notification-management, operations section). `setUnreadCount` defined but never invoked (badge stays "12"). Child pages must be self-contained.

---

### 4.2 Authentication.html (Login)

#### Overview
Standalone login page (not in shell; reached only via `acctLogout()` redirect). Six screens toggled via `showScreen(n)`: (1) Login, (6) 2FA, (2) Forgot Password, (3) OTP Verification, (4) Verification Code, (5) Confirm Password. All actions stubbed with `alert()`; no real auth.

#### CSS Summary
Inline `<style>`, no custom properties, no CDN (emoji glyphs ♾️ 👁️ 🙈). Font `"Segoe UI", Tahoma…`. Body `#f5e8d3`; container white; brand gold `#d4a017` (titles/links/buttons), hover `#c08f0f`; inputs `#f8f8f8`/`#ddd`. Container max-width 420px, otp-box 48×52px. Radius 4–8px. No `@media`/animations.

#### DOM Structure
```
body
├─ #screen1 (Login): #username, #password(+toggle), forgot→showScreen(2), remember checkbox, SEND→showScreen(6)
├─ #screen6 (2FA): 5× otp-box, CONFIRM→alert, back→showScreen(1)
├─ #screen2 (Forgot): #forgot-email, SEND→showScreen(3), back
├─ #screen3 (OTP): readonly email, SEND→showScreen(4), back→showScreen(2)
├─ #screen4 (Verify): 5× otp-box, CONFIRM→showScreen(5), back
└─ #screen5 (Confirm Pwd): #new-pass(+toggle), #confirm-pass(+toggle), CONFIRM→alert, back
```

#### Functions Reference
| Function | Parameters | Description | Called By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `showScreen` | screenNumber | Show one screen, hide rest | links/buttons |
| `togglePassword` | icon | Toggle pwd↔text, swap 👁️/🙈 | toggle spans |
| `moveToNext` | current,index | Auto-focus next OTP box | otp oninput |

#### Notes
Not referenced by any `data-content`. Screen order non-sequential (1,6,2,3,4,5); login SEND→screen6 (2FA). No validation/backend; OTP boxes only auto-advance.

---

### 4.3–4.13 Overview Dashboards (`overview/*.html`)

> **All 11 overview files are clones of one template** — byte-identical `<style>` (`:root` tokens + `#uxTableOverflowFix` + `#uxBaselinePolish`) and byte-identical shared helper `<script>` (`C, TT, ri, rf, dates, L30/L90/L12, spark, donut, hmap, miniBar` + Chart.js defaults set **twice**, redundantly). Each differs only in `<title>`/`page-title`/`page-sub`, body markup, and a final per-page chart-init IIFE. **None has a sidebar/topnav/tab-bar/modal/toast** (standalone iframe modules). All filter `<select>`s are **decorative** (no change handlers); all actions are inline `onclick` native `alert()` stubs. External libs: Font Awesome 6.5.0 + Chart.js 4.4.1.

**Shared helper functions** (present in every overview file):
| Function | Params | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ri(lo,hi,n=30)` | bounds | Array of n random integers |
| `rf(lo,hi,n=30)` | bounds | Array of n random floats (2dp) |
| `dates(n,mode='daily')` | n,mode | n date labels ('Mon D' or month names) |
| `spark(id,data,color)` | — | Mini no-axis line sparkline |
| `donut(id,labels,data,colors)` | — | 65%-cutout doughnut |
| `hmap(containerId,legendId,colorStops)` | — | 7×24 random heatmap grid |
| `miniBar(id,rows)` | — | Horizontal progress bars |
Plus consts `C` (chart colors), `TT` (tooltip style), `L30/L90/L12` (label arrays).

#### 4.3 kpi-dashboard.html
**Default iframe page.** Platform-wide KPIs (agent/end-user/property/revenue) + growth, DAU/WAU/MAU, engagement, listing analytics. Sections: 3× `.g4` KPI rows (sp1–sp12 sparklines), User Growth (`#growthChart` with daily/weekly/monthly `.gran-btn` toggle — **the only real interactive handler in the overview suite**), DAU chart + stickiness ratio-card, Engagement table + bounce gauge, device/propType/txType donuts, Peak Usage heatmap (`#hmKpi`). Charts: 12 sparklines, growthChart (dual-axis New/Total/Churned), dauChart, bounceGauge (doughnut 270°), 3 donuts. Controls: 3 period/section/region selects (cosmetic), Export/Refresh (`alert`). Data: `gData{daily/weekly/monthly}`, inline donut arrays. Sparklines/heatmap regenerate randomly each load (won't match static KPIs).

#### 4.4 ad-performance-dashboard.html
Banner + sponsored-search analytics: impressions/clicks/CTR/conversions/spend/CPC/CPA/viewability/fatigue + top-banners table (static). Charts: `bannerImpChart`(horizontal bar), `hmAd`(heatmap, gold ramp), `sponsoredVsOrganicChart`, `adFunnelChart`(5-stage), `ctrBySlotChart`, `bannerFatigueChart`(multi-line `rf`), `scatterSpendChat`(scatter Pos1/2/3), `viewabilityChart`(scriptable bg color green≥50). Controls: period/adType/agent selects; Export `alert`.

#### 4.5 agent-league-dashboard.html
Agent ranking league table (composite score 0–100). `agents[]`(rank,name,region,listings,spend,rating,resp,plan,score)×7 → `#leagueTableBody` (medals 🥇🥈🥉, `planColors` badges, per-row View `alert`). Charts: leagueListingsChart, leagueAdSpendChart, ratingDistChart(stacked), leagueAdTrendChart(multi-line), hmLeague heatmap. **"Click column header to sort" advertised but NOT implemented; search input decorative.**

#### 4.6 agent-stats-dashboard.html
Agent community stats: registration/active/churn KPIs, growth, registration funnel, status & plan donuts, prefecture ranking, login-frequency histogram, profile-completion gauge. Charts: agentGrowthChart, agentPlanDonut, agentPrefChart, agentFunnelChart, agentStatusDonut, revenueByPlanChart(stacked), loginFreqChart, profileGauge. **Only overview file missing `#uxTableOverflowFix`** (no table). `c-gold` kcard variant referenced but undefined (relies on inline border-top). Funnel non-monotonic.

#### 4.7 end-user-stats-dashboard.html
End-user demographics/behavior: registration/DAU/MAU KPIs, age/nationality/gender/subscription/language distributions, behavioral KPI table, engagement trends, 6-stage user-journey funnel. Charts: ageChart, natChart, genderDonut, subDonut, euDauChart, funnelChart, langPrefDonut, accountAgeChart, subStatusChart(stacked, ×100/÷100 workaround), savesLineChart, newVsReturnChart. Funnel non-monotonic.

#### 4.8 financial-reports-dashboard.html
Revenue/payment reporting: MTD/YTD/MRR/ARR + pending/overdue/refunds/net + revenue-by-source stacked bar + payment-status donut + static transaction log (5 rows, invoice Download `alert`). Charts: revenueChart(stacked 4 sources ×12mo, random), payStatusDonut. Export CSV/Excel + invoice links = `alert`.

#### 4.9 market-analysis-dashboard.html
Macro market intelligence: price/volume/demand trends national/regional. Charts: mktPriceChart(actual+forecast), mktTypePriceChart(3 series), mktStationDemandChart, mktDomChart(4 series), transVolChart(bar+line), seasonalChart, priceVolChart(**color/height decorrelated bug** — `ri()` called twice), absorptionChart. Trending Search Areas table static (8 rows). 4 selects cosmetic; Export `alert`.

#### 4.10 marketing-dashboard.html
Marketing/ad performance: impressions/clicks/CTR/CVR/spend/campaigns/occupancy + campaign table (5 static rows) + geo/topConv charts. Charts: mktImpClChart(dual-axis), mktCtrTypeChart, mktBannerChart, mktSponsoredChart, mktGeoChart(`_geo`,`_gcolors` threshold), topConvChart. Email rows show `—` for impressions (intentional).

#### 4.11 property-stats-dashboard.html
Listing inventory analytics: active listings, price/m², DOM, distributions by type/bedrooms/age/area/price/region. **Uses two shared helpers genuinely** (`donut` for pPropTypeDonut, `miniBar` for #prefBarsP). Charts: priceTrendChart, domChart, pPropTypeDonut, stationChart, bedroomsChart, buildingAgeChart, floorAreaChart, priceRangeChart(bar+cumulative line), domDistChart, priceByAgeChart, domTrendChart.

#### 4.12 report-management-dashboard.html
Moderation/violation-report dashboard. **Only overview file with per-row action buttons:** View(all rows)/Assign(new+unassigned)/Escalate(high+overdue), all `alert`. Charts: reportVolumeChart(bar, x-axis hidden), reportCatDonut. Report queue table static (5 rows). Status badge "Awaiting Info" not in filter options.

#### 4.13 sales-reports-dashboard.html
Smallest (one chart): subscription-plan sales table (Free/Bronze/Silver/Gold) + MRR/churn/LTV/cart KPIs + adRevenueChart(2 series Sponsored/Banner). **Bug:** `ri()` used on fractional ¥M bounds → values collapse to small integers (should be `rf`).

### 4.14 usermanagement/user-account-management.html

#### Overview
End-user (buyer) account management: filterable list + deep single-user **11-section detail** (Engagement Analytics, Profile, Additional Info, Investment & Preferences, Saved Items, Inquiry & Message History, Transaction History [Phase 2], Billing, Notification Settings, Security, Customer Support). Inline View/Edit toggling, suspend/delete/save-as-lead, force-password-reset modal. All demo data; no localStorage.

#### CSS Summary
`:root`: `--bg-body#f5f3ef, --bg-card#fffaf2, --border-subtle#eadccd, --accent#c26b41, --accent-dark#a55232, --text-main#3b2f2a, --text-muted#7a6a5c, --badge-green#2f855a, --badge-red#c53030, --badge-gray#4a5568, --badge-amber#b7791f`, fs tokens. Many badge fills (active/suspended/deactivated/locked/premium). Font system-ui. Card radius 12px, modal 14px, pills 999px. `@media(max-width:768px)` stacks header/toolbar. Font Awesome 6.5.0. Charts are pure-CSS bars (no Chart.js).

#### DOM Structure
`#listView`(page-header[Export CSV], filters card, results table#listBody) + `#detailView.hidden`(toolbar[Back, #modeIndicator; #toolbarView: Edit/Suspend/Delete/Save-as-lead; #toolbarEdit: Cancel/Save], detail-hero, section-grid×11) + `#pwdResetModal`.

#### Functions Reference
`$`, `esc`, `escAttr`, `initials`, `avatarImg`, `getSel`, `fmtYen`, `parseSession`, `badgeStatus`, `badge2FA`, `badgePlan`, `badgePaid`, `badgeYesNo`, `badgeLock`, `badgeIdVerify`, `alertCount`, `alertBadge`, `renderList`, `applyFilters`, `resetFilters`, `vField(value,field,type,options,editable)`, `kv`, `kvFull`, `renderEditableSections`, `showDetail`, `renderDetail`, `renderMonthChart`, `showList`, `enterEditMode`, `cancelEdit`, `saveChanges`, `suspendAccount`, `deleteAccount`, `saveAsLead`(alert), `openChat`(alert), `saveSecurityQuestion`, `saveSecurityAnswer`, `resetPwd`, `closePwdResetModal`, `submitPwdReset`, `exportCsv`(alert).

#### Data Structures
`users[]`(5) — id, fullName, email, avatarFile, regDate, countryCode, phone, status, address, nationality, gender, age, authProvider, withdrawal, prevOwnership, residentCountry, buyerStatus, securityQuestion, securityAnswer, propType[], desiredCity, desiredArea, budgetMin, budgetMax, targetYield, bedrooms, purpose, propStatus, totalLogins, lastLogin, avgSession, savedSearches, savedProps, appraisals, avgRespTime, plan, totalBilling, outstanding, paymentStatus, savedPropsList[], savedSearchesList[], inquiryHistory[], msgSent[12], msgRecv[12], blockedAgents[], closingReports[], purchaseHistory[], refundHistory[], emailNotif, savedPropUpdates, notifFreq, deliveryTime, agentMsgNotif, supportMsgNotif, promo, quietStart/End/Tz, lockStatus, twoFa, lastPwd, lastDevice, failedLogins, idVerify, loginHistory[], lastSupport, memo. Plus `filtered`, `currentUser`, `originalUser`, `editMode`, `SEC_Q_OPTIONS`(7).

#### Modals
`#pwdResetModal` — Reset password: read-only `#pwdSubject`, `#pwdNew`(min 8), `#pwdConfirm`. Confirm `submitPwdReset` (both required, ≥8, match) → close+alert "recorded in Audit Logs". X/Cancel close; **no backdrop/Esc**.

#### Notes
No persistence. Stubs: exportCsv, saveAsLead, openChat, submitPwdReset. Integration stubs: Messages module, Lead group picker, Audit Logs. `vField`'s `editable` param never passed `false`. `authProvider` filter offers Email/Google/Apple/Weibo/WeChat but data has Facebook/LINE (unmatchable). List counts (savedSearches/savedProps scalars) can disagree with array lengths.

### 4.16 usermanagement/admin-management.html

#### Overview
Internal admin/staff account management: filterable list + **6-section detail** (Staff Profile, Employment Status, Role Assignment + history, Security & Password, Operation & Audit Logs, Internal Notes). View/Edit toggle, suspend/delete, "New admin" stub, password-reset modal. Leanest of the three account files (no charts/chips/chat).

#### CSS Summary
Identical 11-token `:root`. Smaller badge set (active/suspended/deactivated/off/locked). Font Awesome 6.5.0.

#### Functions Reference
`$`, `esc`, `escAttr`, `initials`, `avatarImg`, `getSel`, `badgeStatus`, `badge2FA`, `renderList`, `applyFilters`, `resetFilters`, `vField`, `kv`, `kvFull`, `renderEditableSections`, `showDetail`, `renderDetail`, `showList`, `enterEditMode`, `cancelEdit`, `saveChanges`, `suspendAccount`, `deleteAccount`, `resetPwd`, `closePwdResetModal`, `submitPwdReset`, `exportCsv`.

`admins[]`(5) — id, fullName, email, phone, employeeId, avatarFile, dept, createdDate, status, role, permExpiry, roleHistory[], twoFa, lastPwd, lastLogin, ipRestrict, concurrent, vpn, simLimit, auditLogs[], criticalLogs[], pdaLogs[], memo. Logs nested per record.

#### Notes
No localStorage. ADM-004 has empty lastLogin → "Never". Logs read-only (a password reset alerts "recorded in Audit Logs" but does not append). `simLimit===0` → "Unlimited". "New admin" = `alert`.

> **Cross-file (account trio):** all share one design system, identical password-reset modal + `submitPwdReset` validation, and the list↔detail + view/edit-mode architecture with deep-clone revert (`JSON.parse(JSON.stringify())`). None use localStorage/backend/Chart.js; all mutating/external actions are `confirm()`/`alert()` stubs.

### 4.18 usermanagement/agreement-templates.html

#### Overview
Two-column master/detail "Agreement management": left = filterable/sortable template list, right = editor/detail. Drafts editable (title+body); publishing ("Send to agents") flips status to published + read-only. Acceptance summary (signed/total) per agreement. Uses injected UX KIT (toasts, confirm modal, dirty-guard, validation). No FA/Chart.js, no localStorage.

#### CSS Summary
`:root`: `--bg-body#f5f3ef, --bg-card#fffaf2, --border-subtle#eadccd, --accent#c26b41, --accent-soft#f3d7c6, --text-main#3b2f2a, --text-muted#7a6a5c, --badge-green#2f855a, --badge-gray#4a5568, --badge-orange#b7791f`. Status badges draft/published/pending/signed. UX-kit gold `#c4a25f`. `@media` 960/900/760/720.

#### Functions Reference
`getAgreementAcceptanceSummary`, `getLastUpdateLabel`, `_acceptanceStats`, `getFilteredAgreements`, `applyEditability`, `statusBadge`, `acceptanceStatusBadge`(unused), `renderAgreementsTable`, `selectAgreement`, `createNewAgreement`, `saveAgreement`, `sendToAgents`, `initEvents`, `init` + UX-kit (`Toast.*`, `UX.confirm/guard/markClean/markDirty/validate`).

#### Data Structures
`agreements[]`(3: code-of-conduct, data-usage-policy, new-feature-beta) — id, title, status, effectiveFrom, lastUpdatedAt, lastSentAt, body. `agents[]`(3: id,name,office). `acceptanceRecords[]`(6: agreementId,agentId,status,signedAt). `selectedAgreementId`, `els`.

#### Modals
`#uxConfirmModal` — "Publish to all agents?" / "Discard unsaved changes?". OK runs onConfirm; Cancel/backdrop/Esc close.

#### Notes
No localStorage (in-memory). Dirty tracking via `[data-track-dirty]` + beforeunload. Only drafts editable; publishing one-way (no unpublish). `getFilteredAgreements` "now" baseline hardcoded `2026-05-15`. No real publish/notify backend; no UI to view/sign per-agent records.

### 4.19 usermanagement/lead-management.html

#### Overview
"Lead Management": left sidebar with End User / Agent type toggle + CRUD-able Groups list; right area shows leads of the selected group in a type-specific table with filters/sorting. **Groups persist to localStorage**; leads seeded too. Group create/rename use injected modals; delete uses shared UX confirm. **No UI to add/remove leads to a group** (membership fixed by seed). No FA/Chart.js.

#### CSS Summary
No `:root` vars (literal hex). Unique **green** `#3a6b3c` primary (btn-primary/active group/active tab). Body `#f5f3ef`, sidebar/main `#fffaf2`, thead `#f1e4d4`. UX-kit gold `#c4a25f`. `@media` 1199 (table scroll).

#### Functions Reference
`getLeads`, `getGroups`, `saveGroups`, `renderGroupList`, `editGroupName`, `deleteGroup`, `performDeleteGroup`, `loadGroup`, `extractCountry`, `renderLeadTable`, `renderFilters`, `applyFiltersAndRender`, `createGroupWithName`, `openCreateGroupModal`, `openRenameModal`, `setupCreateGroupModal`(IIFE), `setupRenameModal`(IIFE) + UX-kit.

#### Data Structures
`seedLeads` end_user(6: U-1001…1006) — id, entityType, name, email, phone, buyerStatus, location, loginCount, avgSessionMinutes, savedSearchCount, savedPropertyCount, appraisalFormCount, alerts[], createdDate. agent(4: A-101…104) — id, entityType, name, contactName, primaryCity, badge, subscriptionPlan, activeListings, establishedDate, headOfficeAddress, averageRating, totalReviews, salesLast12Months, totalMembersCount, createdDate. `seedGroups`(5: g1-g3 end_user, g4-g5 agent) — id, name, entityType, leadIds[], createdDate. **localStorage keys: `yuushiLeads` (LEAD_KEY), `yuushiLeadGroups` (GROUP_KEY).**

#### Modals
`#groupCreateModal` (name required ≤60 unique per type), `#groupRenameModal` (name required), `#uxConfirmModal` (delete). All close via Cancel/backdrop/Esc.

#### Notes
Leads seeded once, never written back (read-only); groups mutated (create/rename/delete persist). New groups always empty (no add-lead UI). Reset by clearing both keys. **Shared integration point with admin-messages.html and support-account-management.html** (all read/write `yuushiLeadGroups`/`yuushiLeads`).

### 4.20 usermanagement/login-recovery-management.html

Two-column recovery-ticket triage: left = filterable/sortable tickets table; right = detail (identity, reason, uploaded ID doc) + actions (Mark as Solved / Reject). "Mark as Solved" opens a confirm modal collecting register email + new password before queuing recovery email. In-memory; uses shared UX toast/confirm. No FA/Chart.js.

`updateActionButtons`, `statusClass`, `applyFilters`(now=2026-05-15), `renderRequestTable`, `renderDocument`, `formatResolution`(unused/dead), `selectRequest`, `addLogEntry`, `renderLogs`(no-op — DOM missing), `setStatusForSelected`, `openSolveModal`, `closeSolveModal`, `confirmSolve` + UX-kit.

No localStorage. **Bugs:** `applyFilters` references nonexistent `r.recoveryEmail` (email/contact filters never match); `renderLogs`/`addLogEntry` wired but no `#logBody` in DOM (dead); `formatResolution` unused. Depends on injected UX KIT.

### 4.21 usermanagement/roles-permissions.html

#### Overview
Role management + permission-matrix editor. Left = searchable/filterable role list with inline edit/delete + "New role". Right = matrix for selected role (editable name + Save + 8 scopes × R/W/A toggles; toggling Admin auto-enables Read+Write). Create/edit via modal. In-memory; **deletion intentionally stubbed (data not removed)**.

#### Functions Reference
`getRole`, `getFilteredRoles`, `renderRoles`, `renderMatrix`, `createRole`, `openRoleModal`, `closeRoleModal`, `saveRoleFromModal`, `deleteRole`, `_doDeleteRole`(**stub — never splices**) + UX-kit.

#### Data Structures
`permissionScopes`(8: users, leads, properties, content, support, billing, analytics, system — id,label,desc). `roles[]`(4: platform_admin, support_lead, content_editor, finance_ops) — id, name, type, description, permissions{scope:{read,write,admin}}. `selectedRoleId`, `roleModalMode`, `editingRoleId`.

#### Modals
`#roleModal` — "New role"/"Edit role": `#modalRoleName`(req), `#modalRoleDescription`. `#uxConfirmModal` for delete.

#### Notes
No localStorage. **Bug:** `_doDeleteRole` re-renders + toasts "deleted" but never removes from `roles[]` (role reappears). `#deleteRoleBtn` listener registered but element absent. `.assignment-*` CSS unused.

### 4.22 usermanagement/support-account-management.html

#### Overview
Master/detail for third-party support partner accounts (property managers, tax/legal advisors). List = filterable/sortable table with View/Suspend; detail = hero (avatar/name/badge/email + Suspend/Re-activate) + read-only info grid + Save/Unsave lead. Lead feature persists to localStorage via shared **Lead Group Picker** modal. Deep-linkable from Leads via `?from=leads&leadId=`.

#### Functions Reference
`applyFilters`, `renderTable`, `openDetail`, `selectSupport`, `toggleSuspend`, `getStoredLeads`, `saveStoredLeads`, `removeLead`, `isLead`, `updateLeadButtonsForSupport`, `upsertLead`(page, unused), `saveLeadFromSupport`, `unsaveLeadFromSupport` + Lead-Picker IIFE (`openLeadGroupPicker`) + UX-kit.

`supportAccounts[]`(3: SUP-01…03) — id, company, contact, email, category, status, assignedAgents, regions, onboardingStatus, complianceNotes. **localStorage keys (3): `yuushiAdminLeads` (page helpers), `yuushiLeadGroups`, `yuushiLeads` (picker).**

#### Modals
`#leadPickerModal` — "Save to lead group": `#lpSubject`(readonly), `#lpNewName`(new group), `.lp-group` radios; Save `#lpSaveBtn`(disabled until selection). `#uxConfirmModal` for suspend/back-guard.

#### Notes
**Inconsistency:** Save/Unsave buttons check `yuushiAdminLeads`, but picker writes `yuushiLeads`+`yuushiLeadGroups` → saving via picker doesn't update button state. Page-level `upsertLead` defined but unused. Deep-link contract `?from=leads&leadId=<SUP-id>`.

### 4.23 property/property-list-oversight.html

#### Overview
Master Property Management page. Two-view SPA: **List** (filterable table + Export CSV + New property) and **Detail** (schema-driven, group-aware, View/Edit). Three groups (G1 Single Unit, G2 Whole Building, G3 Land) generated from declarative `SEC`/`GROUP_SECS`/`OPT` schemas. Edit mode has reactive `showIf` conditional fields. Detail includes mock Google-Maps POI locator, media gallery, amenities accordion. "New property" modal → group picker; Groups 5/6 deep-link to Project Management. Moderation (Approve/Suspend/Delete) in detail toolbar.

`:root` token set (same as report-management) + extensive badge palette + POI category colors `#2c5282/#c26b41/#6b46c1/#2f855a/#c53030`. Font Awesome 6.5.0. `@keyframes toastIn`. `@media(max-width:768px)`.

#### Functions Reference
`$`, `esc`, `escAttr`, `fmtYen`, `fmtNum`, `fmtPct`, `fmtDate`, `badgePublish`, `badgeMembers`, `badgeTx`, `badgeYesNo`, `badgeGroup`, `toast`, `resolveOpts`, `showIfPass`, `renderField`, `renderViewField`(auto-computes pricePerSqm/rentUnitPrice/pricePerTsubo/occRate), `renderEditField`, `renderSection`, `renderAmenities`, `_hash`, `locatePOIs`(deterministic mock), `fmtDist`, `renderPOI`, `renderMedia`, `thumbIcon`, `priceCell`, `renderList`, `applyFilters`, `resetFilters`, `showDetail`, `showList`, `renderDetail`, `collectInputsToState`, `attachTriggerListeners`, `enterEditMode`, `cancelEdit`, `saveChanges`, `approveListing`, `suspendListing`, `deleteListing`, `openCreateModal`, `closeCreateModal`, `createInGroup`, `exportCsv`, `gotoProjectManagement`(iframe-aware + `localStorage["yuushi.autoCreateGroup"]`), `initFilters`.

`#createModal` — "New property — Select group": cards G1/2/3 (`createInGroup`), G5/6 external (`gotoProjectManagement`). Native `confirm()` gates Approve/Suspend/Delete/Cancel-edit.

Field types: text/num/yen/percent/date/textarea/select/multi/checks/toggle/auto/header/note. Group 4 referenced but no `GROUP_SECS`/`GROUP_META` (dead). G5/6 redirect to Project Management (`yuushi.autoCreateGroup`). POI deterministic (hash of address). All in-memory.

### 4.26 property/property-approval-moderation.html

#### Overview
Two-pane moderation console for approving/rejecting **new** listings (+ reported/flagged). Left = filterable/sortable queue; right = case detail (metadata only — no listing/message content) + Approve/Reject. Decisions open a custom modal capturing an audit note, update status, append to in-memory `decisionLog`, toast. Heavy appended UX-kit/polish CSS (much targets classes absent here). No FA.

#### Functions Reference
`severityClass`, `statusClass`, `applyFilters`, `renderQueue`, `logDecision`, `renderDetail`, `performDecision`, `setupDecisionModal`(IIFE → `window.openDecisionModal`), `toast`, UX-kit `UX.confirm/guard/validate` (unused here).

#### Data Structures
`moderationQueue[]`(3: P-1101 Low/New, P-1102 Medium/User report, P-1103 High/System flag) — id, title, agent, status, reason, severity, reportedBy, note. `decisionLog[]`(0; not rendered), `filters`, `sortMode`, `selectedId`.

#### Modals
`#decisionModal` — "Approve/Reject new property?": `#decisionNote` textarea. Confirm `#decisionOk` (danger on reject) → set status, log, re-render, Toast.ok. Close via backdrop/Esc/Cancel. `#uxConfirmModal` (unused by page).

#### Notes
Metadata-only by design. Approve→Approved, Reject→Rejected. G/M/L view buttons only toggle `.active` (no render change). Severity sort {High:3,Medium:2,Low:1}. In-memory.

### 4.27 property/property-report-management.html

#### Overview
Property-abuse-report console (list+detail SPA). List = 5 KPI tiles (Pending/Reviewing/Resolved/Dismissed/Total) + filterable table. Detail = status-dependent toolbar, status alerts, Report Info + Reporter cards, description, attachments (demo download), reverse-chron audit-log timeline. Two modals: **Resolve** (report valid → suspend/remove listing + optional note + notify checkbox) and **Dismiss/Reject** (close with reason, no listing action). "Mark as Reviewing" advances pending. "Open property" deep-links to property-detail-view. Font Awesome 6.5.

#### Functions Reference
`$`, `esc`, `escAttr`, `fmtDate`, `fmtDateTime`, `badgeStatus`, `badgeReporter`, `badgeReason`, `toast`, `renderKpi`, `renderList`, `applyFilters`, `resetFilters`, `exportCsv`, `showDetail`, `showList`, `attachIcon`, `attachLabel`, `renderDetail`, `nowIso`, `markReviewing`, `openModal`, `closeModal`, `confirmResolve`, `confirmReject`, `openPropertyLink`.

#### Data Structures
`REASON_LABEL`(6), `STATUS_LABEL`(4: pending/reviewing/resolved/rejected→Dismissed), `ACTION_LABEL`(8), `CURRENT_ADMIN`="Admin Tanaka". `reports[]`(5: R-2024-0001…0005) — id, propertyId, propertyTitle, propertyOwner, reporterType, reporterName, reporterEmail, reporterPhone, reason, description, attachments[], status, createdAt, updatedAt, auditLog[], resolveAction?, resolveNote?, rejectReason?, rejectNote?.

#### Modals
`#resolveModal` — "Resolve report — take action on listing": `#resolveAction`(req: suspend_listing/remove_listing), `#resolveNote`, `#resolveNotify`(checked). Confirm `confirmResolve` (blocks if no action). `#rejectModal` — "Dismiss report": `#rejectReason`(req: invalid_report/not_enough_evidence/no_issue_found/duplicate/out_of_scope/other), `#rejectNote`. Confirm `confirmReject`.

#### Notes — resolve/reject logic
Lifecycle: pending→reviewing→resolved OR rejected/Dismissed (reviewing can go straight to either; resolved/rejected terminal). **Resolve** requires action; verb="removed" if remove_listing else "suspended"; appends audit entry incl. verb + optional "Reporter & owner notified by email"; toasts success. **Reject/Dismiss** requires reason; appends audit "No action on listing. Reporter notified"; toasts **warn**; UI label "Dismissed" though internal value `rejected`. Resolve only mutates the report record (no cross-module listing mutation). KPI recomputed live; `newToday` computed but never shown. `openPropertyLink` → `property-detail-view.html?propertyId=…` (does not switch sidebar). In-memory.

### 4.28 contentmanagement/blog.html ("Insights Management")

#### Overview
Admin shell hosting sub-tab nav (Area guides / Articles / News / FAQs) in one card. **Each sub-pane is fetched at runtime** from sibling files (`area-guide.html`, `articles.html`, `news.html`, `faq.html`) via `fetch()`+`DOMParser`, injected, scripts re-executed. Ships 4 editor modals (Blog/Article-News, City guide, Area guide, FAQ) + in-memory `areaGuides` dataset + CRUD that the loaded area-guide pane renders against. `data-default-insights-tab="articles"` → loads guides pane then auto-switches to Articles.

#### CSS Summary
`:root` (same family + `--badge-blue#2b6cb0, --badge-orange#b7791f`). Sub-tab active = green `#3a6b3c`. Modal backdrop `rgba(15,23,42,0.45)`. `@media` 960/900. **No FA link** (classes referenced). Some classes used by JS rows (`badge-category`,`badge-location`,`page-title`,`slug`,`empty-state`) defined in fetched panes, not here.

#### Functions Reference
`loadChildPane`, `switchInsightsSubTab`, `openModal`, `closeModal`, `openBlogEditor`(dynamic category options via `window.getArticleCategoryTags`/`getNewsCategoryTags`), `updateBlogVideoStatusFlag`, `toggleGuideStatus`, `setGuideStatusUI`, `populateLocationSelect`, `updateCityGuideLocationOptions`, `updateAreaGuideLocationOptions`, `openCityGuideEditor`, `closeCityGuideEditor`, `saveCityGuideFromModal`, `openAreaGuideEditor`, `closeAreaGuideEditor`, `saveAreaGuideFromModal`, `getAreaGuideLevelLabel`, `getAreaGuideLocation`, `renderAreaGuides`, `deleteAreaGuide`, `openFaqEditor`.

#### Data Structures
`ACTIVE_USER`="Admin Tanaka". `areaGuideLocations`(Tokyo/Osaka/Fukuoka→cities→areas). `areaGuides[]`(2: Shibuya city, Yoyogi area) — id, level, title, prefecture, city, area, subtitle, introDescription, description, mapDescription, status, author, heroImageName, carouselImageNames[], updatedAt. `blogCategoryOptionsByType{article,news}`, `loadedPanes` cache.

#### Modals
`#modal-blog-editor` (Blog ID ro, Title, Category tag, Transaction type, Thumbnail, Prefecture, Property type, Author ro, Status toggle, Content body, Video flag — Save = `alert` mock), `#modal-city-guide` (`saveCityGuideFromModal`), `#modal-area-guide` (`saveAreaGuideFromModal`), `#modal-faq-editor` (Question, Answer — Save = `alert`).

#### Notes
Shell + shared data layer; list tables live in fetched files. Area/city guide CRUD real (in-memory); blog/FAQ saves mock. `loadChildPane` re-executes child scripts (guarded by cache). No persistence.

## 5. Cross-File Shared Patterns

1. **Iframe shell, no router.** `index.html` is the only nav host; `.menu-item[data-content]` swaps `#contentFrame.src`. URL never changes. Every linked page must be a self-contained document (iframes don't inherit parent CSS).
2. **Beige design-token `:root` family.** `--bg-body/--bg-card/--border-subtle/--accent #c26b41/--accent-dark/--gold #c4a25f/--text-main/--text-muted/--badge-*` recur across most newer pages; status-badge fill palette is identical suite-wide.
3. **List ↔ Detail (or Master/Detail) architecture.** Account, property, lead, support, agreement, recovery, role pages all use a list view + a detail/editor (toggled `#listView`/`#detailView` or two-column), with View/Edit modes and deep-clone revert (`JSON.parse(JSON.stringify())`).
4. **Schema-driven detail rendering.** `property-list-oversight` and `project-management` build forms from declarative `SEC`/`GROUP_SECS`/`OPT` schemas with `showIf` conditional fields, `vField`/`renderField` view-or-edit helpers, and `TRIGGER_FIELDS` reactive re-render.
5. **Shared password-reset modal.** Identical `#pwdResetModal` markup + `submitPwdReset` validation (both required, ≥8, match) in user/agent/admin management.
6. **Injected "UX KIT".** `window.Toast` + `window.UX` (confirm modal, dirty-guard, validation, Esc/backdrop close, beforeunload) reused across agreement-templates, lead-management, login-recovery, roles-permissions, support-account, property-approval-moderation, property-detail-view.
7. **Overview dashboards are template clones** sharing one CSS block + one helper script (`ri/rf/dates/spark/donut/hmap/miniBar/C/TT/L30/L90/L12`); only the chart-init IIFE differs. Chart.js defaults set twice.
8. **Injected polish style blocks** (`#uxBaselinePolish`, `#uxTableOverflowFix`, `#uxResponsiveSplitFix`, `#uxVisualPolish`, `#uxDetailLayout`) appended to many files — some target classes the page doesn't use (shared stylesheet).
9. **Mock data + stubbed actions.** All tabular/chart/form data hardcoded in JS; destructive/external actions are `confirm()`/`alert()`/toasts. POI locators are deterministic hash-based mocks.
10. **Inline `onclick` over `addEventListener`.** Most pages wire handlers via inline attributes; a few (agent-activities, lead-management, content fragments) use `addEventListener`.
11. **Polished navy/terra messaging "Center" modules** (`message-center`, `email-center`) — Chart.js, 5-step builder, contenteditable RTE with `execCommand`, variable chips, audience group picker, create-group modal. (Two older flat "campaign" predecessor pages existed but were removed once superseded.)

---

## 6. Known Issues / Notes

| File | Issue |
|------|-------|
| `security-settings.html` | **Init bug** — `els.expiryDays`/`els.lockoutThreshold` reference non-existent DOM IDs; `applyDefaults()` throws TypeError, likely aborting `init()` (toggle never binds). |
| `roles-permissions.html` | `_doDeleteRole` never removes the role from `roles[]` (UI says "deleted" but it reappears). `#deleteRoleBtn` listener bound to absent element. |
| `login-recovery-management.html` | Filters reference nonexistent `r.recoveryEmail` (email/contact filters never match). `renderLogs`/`addLogEntry` wired but `#logBody` missing (dead). `formatResolution` unused. |
| `support-account-management.html` | Lead storage split: Save/Unsave check `yuushiAdminLeads` but picker writes `yuushiLeads`+`yuushiLeadGroups` → button state doesn't reflect a picker save. |
| `agent-management.html` | `badgeReport` swaps colors (Valid→red, Invalid→gray). License filters compute vs live date. |
| `cms-homepage-management.html` | Duplicate element IDs across the two shells (`toggle-prefecture`, `toggle-faq`, `save-prefecture-btn`) — second instance unwired. `selectProperty` cell-index shift. |
| `articles.html` / `news.html` | Category add/rename non-functional — references missing `#…CategoryInput`/`Cancel`/`Count` elements; only delete works. news.html hardcodes `badge-success` for all statuses. |
| `area-guide.html` | Filters re-render but render ignores their values; Edit buttons inert; malformed trailing `</table></div>`. |
| `faq.html` | Static, no JS; search/status/drag controls non-functional. |
| `sales-reports-dashboard.html` | `ri()` on fractional ¥M bounds collapses revenue to small integers (should be `rf`). |
| `market-analysis-dashboard.html` | `priceVolChart` bar color/height decorrelated (`ri()` called twice). |
| `agent-stats-dashboard.html` | `c-gold` kcard variant undefined; funnel non-monotonic. Missing `#uxTableOverflowFix`. |
| `agent-ad-booking.html` | "Inter" font declared but never loaded (falls back to Segoe UI). |
| `plans-subscriptions.html` | `gotoAdManagement` defined but no caller (dead). Tab IDs `tab-1`/`tab-4` imply removed tabs. |
| `region-station-railway.html` | All in-modal Edit/Save/Add buttons are unwired stubs. |
| `property-detail-view.html` | Edit/Add mode only fully implemented for Group 5. References `#detailView` selectors absent here (cross-page CSS). |
| `property-list-oversight.html` | Group 4 referenced in helpers but no `GROUP_SECS`/`GROUP_META` (dead). |
| `index.html` | `setUnreadCount` defined but never called (badge fixed at "12"). |
| Overview suite | Chart.js defaults assigned twice; random chart data won't reconcile with static KPI numbers. |
| General | No persistence on most pages — edits/deletes lost on reload. Commented-out sidebar items (`customer-support-console`, `notification-management`, operations section) whose files exist (two now deleted). |

---

## 7. Integration Points (where the frontend expects a backend/cross-module wiring)

- **Iframe routing contract:** child pages loaded via `data-content`; cross-page nav uses `?id=`/`?propertyId=`/`?group=`/`?from=leads&leadId=` query params and (in property pages) `window.parent.document.getElementById('contentFrame')` + active-menu syncing.
- **localStorage as a mock data bus:**
  - `yuushiLeads` + `yuushiLeadGroups` — shared lead store written by `lead-management.html`, `admin-messages.html`, and `support-account-management.html` (lead group picker). A real backend would replace these with a Leads API.
  - `yuushiAdminLeads` — separate page-level lead store in `support-account-management.html` (should be reconciled with the above).
  - `yuushi.autoCreateGroup` — handoff flag between `property-list-oversight.html` and `project-management.html`.
  - `yuushi.sellGuide.v2` — Sell Guide content (the only content page that persists).
  - `cmsArticleCategories` / `cmsNewsCategories` — category tag stores (articles/news fragments).
  - `property-draft-<id>` — property edit autosave drafts (property-detail-view).
- **Audit Logs:** numerous pages alert "recorded in Audit Logs" (password resets, settings/profile/platform/appraisal saves) — a real audit-write API is implied but unimplemented (`audit-logs.html` is read-only display + CSV export).
- **Messaging module:** account pages' `openChat`/`saveAsLead` and the chat console expect a Messages backend and a shared Lead group picker.
- **Email/SMS dispatch:** `email-center`/`message-center` builders, templates, automations, and analytics expect a campaign-send + delivery-tracking backend (currently in-memory + Chart.js mock series).
- **Ad/monetisation:** `ad-management` approval/pricing/pool flows, `plans-subscriptions` budget caps, and the agent/client booking pages expect ad-inventory, billing (Stripe checkout stubs), and appraisal-referral APIs.
- **Content delivery:** `blog.html` fetches sibling sub-panes at runtime (`fetch()`+`DOMParser`) — a CMS that serves these as partials; `static-page-management` (Quill HTML) and `cms-homepage-management` (SheetJS Excel import) expect content-store + file-upload endpoints.
- **Auth:** `Authentication.html` flows (login/2FA/OTP/password reset) are entirely stubbed and expect an auth backend; `index.html` logout redirects here.
- **File uploads:** avatars, logos, platform/social icons, property media, ad creatives are read client-side as base64 data URLs (FileReader) — expect real object-storage upload endpoints.

---

*End of documentation. 49 source files (two legacy messaging-campaign pages have since been removed).*
